activities.title: My Activities
activities.no_data_desc: It looks like you haven't had any recent activity. We're here when you're ready!
activities.connect_strava_desc: Connect your Strava account to sync your activities automatically.
activities.connect_strava_first: Please connect your Strava account first

validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters

auth.passwordHint: Use a strong password with at least 8 characters including numbers, and special characters.

groups.title: Groups
groups.subtitle: Connect with your running community
groups.no_joined_groups: You haven't joined any groups yet. Create one or browse other groups to join!
groups.no_available_groups: No groups available to join right now. Try again later or create your own.

group_detail.title: Group Details

toast.request_failed: There is error when requesting to join group
toast.cancel_request_failed: There is error when cancelling request

modal.delete_message: This action cannot be undone. All contests and members in "{{groupName}}" will be removed permanently.
modal.leave_message: Are you sure you want to leave this group? You will lose access to all contests and activities.
modal.join_message: Send a request to join "{{groupName}}"? The admin will need to approve your request.
modal.cancel_request_message: Are you sure you want to cancel your join request? You will need to send a new request if you change your mind.

group_detail.private_contests_content: You need to be a member to view contests information
group_detail.private_members_content: You need to be a member to view members information

connect_strava.title: Strava Integration
connect_strava.subtitle: Sync your running activities
connect_strava.connect_desc: Link your Strava account to automatically sync your running and cycling activities
connect_strava.redirect_note: You'll be redirected to Strava to authorize
connect_strava.toast_connected_desc: Your activities will now sync automatically
connect_strava.error_invalid_state: Invalid session - please log in again
connect_strava.error_invalid_token: Session expired - please log in again
connect_strava.error_user_not_found: User not found - please log in again
connect_strava.error_strava_already_connected: This Strava account is connected to another user
connect_strava.error_token_exchange_failed: Failed to connect - please try again
